messages.content:
قح وترجم ذلك بالإنجليزية

عزيزتي خلود … أشكر لك دعمك الكريم لتعويض البدائل في قسم الكول سنتر بأسرع وقت ممكن حيث أن ذلك يؤثر سلبآ على جودة مستوى الخدمة المقدمة وبالتالي إنعكاسات ذلك سلبآ على إنتاجية المواعيد وحجم مشاهدات العيادات الخارجية

I appreciate your kind support, Khulood, to compensate for the alternatives in the call center department as soon as possible, as this negatively affects the quality of the service provided and consequently reflects negatively on the productivity of appointments and the volume of external clinic views.
نشكر لك تفهمك وتعاونك
You're welcome! It's my pleasure to be of help.

revised this email

Dear Mrs. Kholoud

I appreciate your kind support to compensate the call center agents replacements ASAP, as this negatively affects the quality of the service provided and consequently reflects negatively on the productivity of appointments and the volume of OPD patients seen.

We thank you for your understanding and cooperation

Dear Mrs. Kholoud,

Thank you for your valued support in addressing the swift replacement of call center agents. It is essential to address this promptly, as any delays negatively impact the quality of service provided, leading to reduced productivity of appointments and OPD patient volumes.

Once again, we express our sincere gratitude for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards, [Your Name]

revised this email

Dear Mrs. Kholoud,
Hope you’re doing well

Thank you for your valued support in addressing the swift replacement of call center agents. It is essential to address this promptly, as any delays negatively impact the quality of service provided, leading to reduced productivity of appointments and OPD patient volumes.

Once again, we express our sincere gratitude for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

Dear Mrs. Kholoud,

I hope this email finds you well.

I would like to express my gratitude for your valued support in promptly addressing the replacement of call center agents. As you know, any delays in handling this matter negatively impact the quality of service provided, ultimately reducing the productivity of appointments and volume of OPD patients seen. 

Again, I would like to thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards, 

[Your Name]
